title: fix(deps): update module github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2 to v2.3.1
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit) | `v2.2.0` -> `v2.3.1` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit%2fv2/v2.3.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit%2fv2/v2.3.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit%2fv2/v2.2.0/v2.3.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit%2fv2/v2.2.0/v2.3.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rootless-containers/rootlesskit (github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2)</summary>

### [`v2.3.1`](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/tag/v2.3.1)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/compare/v2.3.0...v2.3.1)

##### Changes

-   Fixed the pipeline for the binary release ([#​462](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/462))

##### Install

    mkdir -p ~/bin
    curl -sSL https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/download//rootlesskit-$(uname -m).tar.gz | tar Cxzv ~/bin

##### About the binaries

The binaries were built automatically on GitHub Actions.
See the log to verify SHA256SUMS.
https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/actions/runs/10434698179
The sha256sum of the SHA256SUMS file itself is a833d35ae59e64152706f93c0cfe2ec33feef29971794ee52de070184fc1222b .

### [`v2.3.0`](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/tag/v2.3.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/compare/v2.2.0...v2.3.0)

> \[!NOTE]
> Binaries are missing in this release due [https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/461](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/461)461 .
> Will be fixed in v2.3.1.

#### What's Changed

-   Let pasta configure interface, fix IPv6 outbound connectivity by [@​sbrivio-rh](https://togithub.com/sbrivio-rh) in [https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/pull/458](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/pull/458)
-   Deprecate rootlesskit-docker-proxy (no longer needed since Docker v28) by [@​AkihiroSuda](https://togithub.com/AkihiroSuda) in [https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/pull/459](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/pull/459)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​sbrivio-rh](https://togithub.com/sbrivio-rh) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/pull/458](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/pull/458)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/compare/v2.2.0...v2.3.0

</details>

---
